description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run all python tests that runs on push to master and next-minor-release branches and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow should have three jobs: linting with flake8 on ubuntu-latest, testing with pytest on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with multiple Python versions, and building on windows-latest with multiple Python versions. Each job should check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, and run tests with pytest.
